subject: Rep. Maxine Waters called for confrontation in Minneapolis. I held her accountable. Now, Pelosi is demanding I APOLOGIZE?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Help me fire Pelosi and take back the House for Republicans!

You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk1MjkzOTE%3d&x=6e878356) at any time.

Hey Fellow Conservative,

Last week, high-ranking National Democrat, Representative Maxine Waters, said _**Minneapolis protesters should "get more confrontational." **_

In response, I asked Speaker Pelosi to **REJECT** double standards, make her Democrats play by the same rules as Republicans, and **PUNISH MAXINE WATERS!**

What did Pelosi have to say about that? She said Maxine Waters doesn't need to apologize for inciting riots..._but** "that woman on the floor should be apologizing for what she said." **_
**Fellow Conservative, "that woman" is ME.
And I have absolutely nothing to apologize for.**

Speaker Pelosi only wants to play partisan games and lacks RESPECT for anyone outside her National Democrats. [**Join me, fire Pelosi, and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/2/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=d5436528)

[**FIRE PELOSI**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=92d36115)

[**CONTRIBUTE NOW >>>**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/4/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=8b7dedd3)

_**5x impact active for 30 minutes

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/5/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=60bb7706)**_

**Speaker Pelosi NEEDS to learn the name of "that woman." It's Lisa McClain.** I'd hope as a fellow mother, Member of Congress, and American, she'd have the respect to refer to me by name.

_**I guess since I 'm not one of her National Democrats, I don't deserve that courtesy. **_

Hear me, Fellow Conservative-Pelosi refusing to have the baseline respect to learn one of her colleagues' name pales in comparison to her refusal to hold her Democrats to the same standards applied to Republicans.

[**She is unfit for the Speakership and must be removed now. If you agree, help me fire Pelosi and take back the House for Republicans!**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/6/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=963626cc)

**Pelosi MUST be fired immediately. I 've convinced the House GOP to find a donor to 5x MATCH the impact of your donation-but only for the next 30 minutes.**

[**FIRE PELOSI**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/7/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=7725736e)

[**CONTRIBUTE NOW >>>**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/8/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=8eac5ec8)

_**5x impact active for 30 minutes**_

Thank you for your support of your House Republicans!

Sincerely,

Rep. Lisa McClain
(MI-R)
[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9529391/224717773/199352/9/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=2c44c1cb)

Friends -
Today is election day and the only way we get Jana Lynne Sanchez to Washington D.C. is if Democrats show up to the polls today.
Not a single Texas Republican in office supported relief payments for Americans. If we do not show up today to get Jana to the runoff on May 25th, we risk sending yet another Texas Republican to Washington D.C. that said no to money in your pocket when you needed it most.
And that is not the end of it.
A no to the relief package is a no to money to reopen schools, a no to grants for small businesses, and a no to money for hardworking Texans who got laid off.
We already have a lot working against us. The bottom line is we don’t need to add anything else.

body:
#

Friend,
Thank you for being a part of our grassroots team to elect Malcolm Kenyatta!
Nothing we do would be possible without YOU — and we’re so grateful for your support in our fight for working families in Pennsylvania and across the country.
This campaign is for working people, powered by working people. That’s why we ask you to pitch in from time to time.
**But today is different — we’re asking you to pitch in _and_ join us for our next Team Malcolm virtual grassroots fundraiser featuring celebrity guest Alyssa Milano!**
[Chip in any amount (even $1) below and we’ll send you a link to join us Tuesday, May 4 at 6 pm EST >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28507752/283460219/947993528?refcode2=b8b695e0-89aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210501-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGI2OTVlMC04OWFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnowTCy8JUcwuP2_O3Wu5X13m-PznJ0ayg2X2ad9gBw=)

clean_body: Friend, Thank you for being a part of our grassroots team to elect Malcolm Kenyatta! Nothing we do would be possible without YOU — and we’re so grateful for your support in our fight for working families in Pennsylvania and across the country. This campaign is for working people, powered by working people. That’s why we ask you to pitch in from time to time. But today is different — we’re asking you to pitch in and join us for our next Team Malcolm virtual grassroots fundraiser featuring celebrity guest Alyssa Milano! = = = We’ll talk all about our plan to build a huge coalition of working folks to keep Pennsylvania and the U.S. Senate blue! It’s going to be a lot of fun, so we hope you can join us. Click below to make a donation of any amount to our campaign and we’ll send you a Zoom link to join us on Tuesday at 6 pm EST: See you there! Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. Friend, Did you know that California ranks LAST in the nation for availability of in-person schooling? Well, it's true. As a result, we're experiencing the largest enrollment drop in two decades. When I read that, I was appalled, and I know you must be too. Ensuring our communities have access to great education and have the ability to do in-person learning is critical to the success of our kids, families, and district. That's why I have never wavered from my commitment to put teachers, students, and education first. **Gavin Newsom 's failure to reopen schools is disappointing! California's children deserve better. ** That's why I'm taking action. My team and I just launched our official petition to demand Gavin Newsom reopen schools, and we want you to join our efforts. We're asking 2,000 of our top grassroots conservatives across the country to sign their name before midnight to send a message loud and clear to return our kids to the classroom. Our goal is ambitious, but we know how the people of California feel about Newsom. We deserve better, so we will demand action and accountability. [**Will you sign, Friend?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XWyuilTR-ovFwNy8G0KPCynJLZY9gyw7U8lA2wVe8uULiLHf2ydp-tdHKghbere5uj9LB1clZ1dUuXL4D8sr2Ix5fW1KMSgtxkHoRTU_CUUvQ_O7mmWZZFR-Szb0RDU_b4f-TfG2QajHARxhLLL1LRhzSv0KvZSipbAX2eX2Or6k5p_4aUtAz6WaqXYyd1PgGPgPlTwGU1BNtZ0zOtlf2LNVQDk-bucxrux5tozjiGgaefey-BZowyrva9mE1Ppc3gdk63kmlbyxvSB_8jooanjPf_lfQVCwvSah_OJ2Akw08Dy2t_oGUirUKFXXg8XPKOMbD29AiclF-lsE6sEnjOECQfLE2X3MB6HA3vztBa4TnoRrB_L2mDlGAJLLSfYeRuosFzSTZ_czT4WcxUxi86Y_Fw_AmClnhFVHM3yMYh6y69kcLv3Gcg==&c=G_aglRVkzfL9fzq_l04LfqGMyuh3BiWzFSp7I63lvAWP0dmoMNXfcA==&ch=iuDNf17kVOhkrk1gKOXuHLnvYMynVdJ_TvaxzigpMzrE-lVOWhghRA==) **DEMAND GAVIN NEWSOM REOPEN SCHOOLS**
**Signature Goal:** 2,000
**Deadline:** 11:59 PM Tonight | [**Add Your Name ->**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XWyuilTR-ovFwNy8G0KPCynJLZY9gyw7U8lA2wVe8uULiLHf2ydp-tdHKghbere5uj9LB1clZ1dUuXL4D8sr2Ix5fW1KMSgtxkHoRTU_CUUvQ_O7mmWZZFR-Szb0RDU_b4f-TfG2QajHARxhLLL1LRhzSv0KvZSipbAX2eX2Or6k5p_4aUtAz6WaqXYyd1PgGPgPlTwGU1BNtZ0zOtlf2LNVQDk-bucxrux5tozjiGgaefey-BZowyrva9mE1Ppc3gdk63kmlbyxvSB_8jooanjPf_lfQVCwvSah_OJ2Akw08Dy2t_oGUirUKFXXg8XPKOMbD29AiclF-lsE6sEnjOECQfLE2X3MB6HA3vztBa4TnoRrB_L2mDlGAJLLSfYeRuosFzSTZ_czT4WcxUxi86Y_Fw_AmClnhFVHM3yMYh6y69kcLv3Gcg==&c=G_aglRVkzfL9fzq_l04LfqGMyuh3BiWzFSp7I63lvAWP0dmoMNXfcA==&ch=iuDNf17kVOhkrk1gKOXuHLnvYMynVdJ_TvaxzigpMzrE-lVOWhghRA==)

In-person instruction is vital to a child's intellectual development. We owe it to our children to do everything we can to set them up for success. Right now, they're falling behind.
To make a difference, it's going to take a collective effort. _Now, is our chance._
Please, Friend, we urge you to be one of the 2,000 signatures we need to send a message loud and clear that schools should reopen. Don't wait! [**I will be reading over the list of signatures first thing in the morning, and I hope to see your name at the top!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XWyuilTR-ovFwNy8G0KPCynJLZY9gyw7U8lA2wVe8uULiLHf2ydp-tdHKghbere5uj9LB1clZ1dUuXL4D8sr2Ix5fW1KMSgtxkHoRTU_CUUvQ_O7mmWZZFR-Szb0RDU_b4f-TfG2QajHARxhLLL1LRhzSv0KvZSipbAX2eX2Or6k5p_4aUtAz6WaqXYyd1PgGPgPlTwGU1BNtZ0zOtlf2LNVQDk-bucxrux5tozjiGgaefey-BZowyrva9mE1Ppc3gdk63kmlbyxvSB_8jooanjPf_lfQVCwvSah_OJ2Akw08Dy2t_oGUirUKFXXg8XPKOMbD29AiclF-lsE6sEnjOECQfLE2X3MB6HA3vztBa4TnoRrB_L2mDlGAJLLSfYeRuosFzSTZ_czT4WcxUxi86Y_Fw_AmClnhFVHM3yMYh6y69kcLv3Gcg==&c=G_aglRVkzfL9fzq_l04LfqGMyuh3BiWzFSp7I63lvAWP0dmoMNXfcA==&ch=iuDNf17kVOhkrk1gKOXuHLnvYMynVdJ_TvaxzigpMzrE-lVOWhghRA==)

Help me fire Pelosi and take back the House for Republicans!

Hey Fellow Conservative,

Last week, high-ranking National Democrat, Representative Maxine Waters, said _**Minneapolis protesters should "get more confrontational." **_

In response, I asked Speaker Pelosi to **REJECT** double standards, make her Democrats play by the same rules as Republicans, and **PUNISH MAXINE WATERS!**

What did Pelosi have to say about that? She said Maxine Waters doesn't need to apologize for inciting riots..._but** "that woman on the floor should be apologizing for what she said." **_

**Fellow Conservative, "that woman" is ME.
And I have absolutely nothing to apologize for.**

Speaker Pelosi only wants to play partisan games and lacks RESPECT for anyone outside her National Democrats. **Joe Biden and AOC are on a mission to destroy our way of life. **

Democrats recently reintroduced the **Green New Deal** , and it's the most EXTREME environmental proposal America has ever seen. Among the most concerning parts of the plan is its blatant attempt to decimate the animal agriculture industry.

With its $93 trillion price tag and ridiculous limitations placed on beef producers and livestock ranchers, the Green New Deal would be an absolute DISASTER for middle America.
**[**SAY NO TO THE GREEN NEW DEAL**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vNWLe0zqvO5ChVUYvgKTpatSRrIxWNLqExfMHteTZ3yGpxMirEobTPGwwb3346IEVo7uiIn8ogQRogd5Yog_-NEiRZteRr8rsclJERBbWqVMKgcW0KxGqDhUkRJA_x2E1Bsl-1DhaWtC0W-Ck7Xn76TEYjbeFOl0ma-u2RkvwhtFaCS1-vzCun4Ya5GHKm4e0bxDfwwvLcRQnuOnIEBIQkM5RiFrKKXMI81p-6O_Z9IoHV0YRTYN_rdOV5IZtG6g7H4Qr-8txQ-SWAA_UPMxTYGddP77JSbIIq5tpVFvRQrq3BoOe4KUkmPX2tlDKdZaLuUXnFFX41oPcFz9JjNozLzobxh2J5K_YgvhTt8uAGrhxUHIr8TnzKN8sRj9MgMk2g03YeZ_SvrIY8oPute7wiMk-qKqxoCDJSyywd8ihXg=&c=bt5DFyX-RtOVwp1BPK73KMpxMiuUo3pwnZ1_lRjcV-WC6OjGH6UH5A==&ch=U7WJrAUW7ATLHm4BEwGFLH0FUVMXlYQYGc5cUzHtCkyLFmbfH-fWgA==)**

It's clear that the Left is aiming to please their megadonors and rich friends on the coast with this thoughtless climate agenda while they utterly disregard the rest of the country. But our agriculture workers are the backbone of America. Joni is doing everything she can to stand up for farmers across the country and protect us all from this disastrous plan, but she can't do it without your help, Friend.

If we lose, here's what's at stake: Stopping the spread of socialism once and for all Defending President Trump's legacy Saving our nation from the radical Left's destruction Fellow Conservative, it's not too late. In fact, it's never been more urgent. == Ignore this and the GOP loses. If we lose this seat, we won 't flip the House. And after what happened in Georgia.... Do you really want to take that chance? We can't take our feet off the gas. == == Thank you, House Republicans Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aVCQmBo1DJ0CUFF9h4yvzZNfA_QwgN1Jd3HdvgnVGgGcH2tzEJBJyAdBEpnnpwQyIIjZ9-EiE0x2Pqx0HQ3wrhU0NTHPZxIFqu1xNN4fsnVF35ZnlWEWzf2XNzWAwMT08Ojs9pJ0VTs=&c=NUf_tQrmwCx09EdMAKpnr-LnI1i1pZJUwAqJadsBmkME0qSqFc8Mvw==&ch=uZFTuQdJ-NGTGaudo2R7ndJIXow6WS23jVGqeILajGnvSnUJadBxzQ==).

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: The attacks on Tim Scott are getting worse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/v66zCQUuN-
I want to show Tim that there are still grassroots conservative
patriots who will stand with him against the Democrats' attacks
and lies. Will you chip in to help, Peter?

Peter,
Senator Tim Scott has been subject to wave after wave of liberal
attacks since he was first elected.

And since Tim delivered the Republican response to Biden's recent
congressional address, the left wing lies and attacks against Tim
have started getting much worse.

I want to show Tim that there are still grassroots conservative
patriots who will stand with him against the Democrats' attacks
and lies. Will you chip in to help, Peter?
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/newt-says-support-tim/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210502_SM-CZ.101461_newt-gingrich_t1060927-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210502_the-attacks-on-tim-scott-are-getting-worse)

STAND WITH TIM
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/newt-says-support-tim/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210502_SM-CZ.101461_newt-gingrich_t1060927-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210502_the-attacks-on-tim-scott-are-getting-worse)
Tim has been subject to racist attacks that are too disgusting to
ever be written down, and all from the "tolerant" liberal left.

I have set an ambitious goal of recruiting 10,000 patriots to
stand with Tim. We need to show him that he still has supporters
who will stand with him against these attacks.

STAND WITH TIM
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/newt-says-support-tim/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210502_SM-CZ.101461_newt-gingrich_t1060927-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210502_the-attacks-on-tim-scott-are-getting-worse)
Tim Scott has just done wonders by sharing a positive
conservative vision with America. I need you and 10,000 other
conservative patriots to join me in standing with Tim and help
stop the left's attacks against him.
(https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/newt-says-support-tim/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210502_SM-CZ.101461_newt-gingrich_t1060927-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-CZ.101461&utm_content=20210502_the-attacks-on-tim-scott-are-getting-worse)

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

| Last month, Greater Georgia [launched](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sVMebEVHXhYKiv3_ynKAfoUZfTQg0no1mBo9LyYWsEuP3BOQps0nQTyhs75xNK7TR4qed21Vw5-WTkGNxCRX8cpJqhN4JdXokz1TQzTAgaqQ4Z-EC4lgbTIQnA92lCO64oes49TZwd-o1h7P_01FBDF0fKBqr9OMTUgnqKhd70QC4BhVzWcAce27DS2yJheRFFmGs0ga7XXq1rA1GQGC9rLK81I50Uid&c=lSWTcVfd34RRDCqn_gzlYIcH87b2h2jvV2C03h0TiZdMwpBQimL24Q==&ch=p8NoVO8MeZoyF0WjjThqiRG8i1BgbqWGT7-81wAtERnHQlvbMxBZzw==&jrc=1) a digital billboard campaign [highlighting](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sVMebEVHXhYKiv3_ynKAfoUZfTQg0no1mBo9LyYWsEuP3BOQps0nQTyhs75xNK7Tqh6boXmyd1E1HSzawSkfORm2DrC_MqMv4Qc9trSDm4_Zkt8CsB0bOqXXHSN6lOCycLT8i0s9uqDxMVYPRrGsClhmOZOZTGpk8QosPeU1jlvYdIKY5r6Awvqw48VfFsahnWJV5rg8PUqk5Klfk3Vqrdc3kQFCuck7MfRLDOCMlfIyskUt7bWL6okT1jLDA_4tFosYwKeoFzydwPsKuKXZh5Ri0vVQKGHyeX2PTu0-WgvUn8fXzFXMVYP7qkljl_NQ41h8_IrAjbk=&c=lSWTcVfd34RRDCqn_gzlYIcH87b2h2jvV2C03h0TiZdMwpBQimL24Q==&ch=p8NoVO8MeZoyF0WjjThqiRG8i1BgbqWGT7-81wAtERnHQlvbMxBZzw==&jrc=1) Major League Baseball's uninformed decision to move the All-Star game from Georgia. | Greater Georgia is also [standing up](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sVMebEVHXhYKiv3_ynKAfoUZfTQg0no1mBo9LyYWsEuP3BOQps0nQTyhs75xNK7TOBRUYMrBnNBhlD5s2ypsJt09cYnuPCiZLDmFPiUpJd1682emTPYuIeqcgK_LFnAdycmxSxNx7z9TogYRRM_rQG5pjQIQ8JOfRrOzyfKONMckSEjtaWiSiWWFYBzHrt6XBkDGEKKPJfvfQX9PWZvUU271GlMUUu1NHiWiNwLw5Elr239WpPseMA==&c=lSWTcVfd34RRDCqn_gzlYIcH87b2h2jvV2C03h0TiZdMwpBQimL24Q==&ch=p8NoVO8MeZoyF0WjjThqiRG8i1BgbqWGT7-81wAtERnHQlvbMxBZzw==&jrc=1) for election integrity by calling for an [investigation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sVMebEVHXhYKiv3_ynKAfoUZfTQg0no1mBo9LyYWsEuP3BOQps0nQTyhs75xNK7TfwTZc_wwBKlmVBQCt0MtBmmt4m7u-izDm6474XEr-G-QljPfWhbmsA9q4c5Cb7_Q-KNajvgir3zxC-2I-tg_jeUoCb15aWqSJFAWJr9Yx99bJP5KLph5a5H0zMsNFKZaho4yy605zkmAZfzD7LrwtB3yWVyvTVr12ZMBWmS9q6hUyHz5FcXeWCtX4IyGOMbCMlzTYNBTA6BaO0H3yD6SS0vo9kMU1Bfef5zD49bLg6Q=&c=lSWTcVfd34RRDCqn_gzlYIcH87b2h2jvV2C03h0TiZdMwpBQimL24Q==&ch=p8NoVO8MeZoyF0WjjThqiRG8i1BgbqWGT7-81wAtERnHQlvbMxBZzw==&jrc=1) into Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's professional conduct. In a letter sent to Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler seeks an investigation into whether Raffensperger used his position to further his own political self-interests.
Raffensperger made numerous questionable decisions leading up to the 2020 elections, including the mass mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot requests, entering into a consent decree without the legislature's awareness, accepting millions in outside money, and failing to resolve hundreds of open investigations from the primary and general elections. Through Kelly's letter, Greater Georgia is [fighting](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sVMebEVHXhYKiv3_ynKAfoUZfTQg0no1mBo9LyYWsEuP3BOQps0nQTyhs75xNK7T47QpVVZsk3Bi_YFsCbFoEPMMM1hiQlfz20hAJDbM06sidGD3ttlTq61L4YLLhOQWJ7h8-Rezb4f4LqF66XC-qS5l81IL51Yjb798KGrrvSt-guD2mERajkDX0R2mt4tw15XyMCgA4R76XhzMrKGv5hxZUGbE2BqkZvQKmMCsA6Fbf1mQ1uG7xq76ZL74a-MeOPcOqYL_YiPkbzjzEenfNYlhC4A2OyIdbHwgMPBFfLl77w9c56OwVo-wnREYehsmdDcm2ySk5mKkG1VzHQXzA21LypBy2Prg_lqO1CJ9X2qQki5idKYR8fr_emH6-72yPXXV8ynmN-OdGb4ZOuLEfw==&c=lSWTcVfd34RRDCqn_gzlYIcH87b2h2jvV2C03h0TiZdMwpBQimL24Q==&ch=p8NoVO8MeZoyF0WjjThqiRG8i1BgbqWGT7-81wAtERnHQlvbMxBZzw==&jrc=1) to restore confidence and transparency in the elections process and to hold our state's top elections official accountable.

| [WATCH: Kelly Loeffler Rips Brad Raffensperger for Rapid, Inconsistent Changes in 2020 Election, Seeks Investigation](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sVMebEVHXhYKiv3_ynKAfoUZfTQg0no1mBo9LyYWsEuP3BOQps0nQTyhs75xNK7T2-IxZyGhkMAA_Rga0PtmcNsqDRFqp-ZeVGiUI0XrpsCJuTMqbE3j2wi5WLHmEoFXaHY4JpKEej44SlzmyXFO0g==&c=lSWTcVfd34RRDCqn_gzlYIcH87b2h2jvV2C03h0TiZdMwpBQimL24Q==&ch=p8NoVO8MeZoyF0WjjThqiRG8i1BgbqWGT7-81wAtERnHQlvbMxBZzw==&jrc=1) April 30, 2021
"... I'm simply asking [Raffensperger] to be held accountable for sweeping changes he made that has created a crisis of confidence here in Georgia in our election integrity. When you look at what happened in 2020 under his leadership ... he failed to do his job. He implemented a consent decree unbeknownst to our general assembly that materially changed the absentee ballot signature verification process. He accepted $5.5 million from Big Tech unbeknownst to Georgians. Specifically, the billboards the role of far-left Democrats in spreading a about the Election Integrity Act. The billboards are displayed in high-trafficked areas near Truist Park. Through this campaign, Greater Georgia is holding Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock, and Stacey Abrams for for their damaging lies by making sure Georgians know the left is responsible for costing Georgia a opportunity. See the billboards below: | | | | | | Greater Georgia is also for election integrity by calling for an into Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's professional conduct. In a letter sent to Georgia Attorney General Chris Carr, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler seeks an investigation into whether Raffensperger used his position to further his own political self-interests. Raffensperger made numerous questionable decisions leading up to the 2020 elections, including the mass mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot requests, entering into a consent decree without the legislature's awareness, accepting millions in outside money, and failing to resolve hundreds of open investigations from the primary and general elections. Through Kelly's letter, Greater Georgia is to restore confidence and transparency in the elections process and to hold our state's top elections official accountable. body:
Will Mike Garcia stick with Matt Gaetz even now?
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28519299/283495814/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2E2Ni1hOWFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kqw7t-j0MMIvX8sCkXgCx820eerB4hRs0LAxn2YRBCU=&emci=4296ca11-e6a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=28d87a66-a9aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

If you haven’t heard the _disgusting_ news by now, Matt Gaetz -- a top contender for the worst-member-of-Congress award -- is even dirtier than we knew.

The Daily Beast just reported that he _paid a minor for sex._

Obviously, Gaetz must be completely disqualified from serving in the House for even one day longer -- beyond that, the Justice Department can decide.

But here in CA-25, we also have to contend with the fact that our representative _accepted money_ from this scumbag to power his 2020 election campaign.

**[We’re calling on Mike Garcia to send that money back _right now,_ Peter. Will you join us by adding your name here?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28519300/283495815/-904933367?ms=em21_210501_rr&refcode=em21_210501_rr&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2E2Ni1hOWFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kqw7t-j0MMIvX8sCkXgCx820eerB4hRs0LAxn2YRBCU=&emci=4296ca11-e6a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=28d87a66-a9aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28519301/283495816/-904933367?ms=em21_210501_rr&refcode=em21_210501_rr&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2E2Ni1hOWFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kqw7t-j0MMIvX8sCkXgCx820eerB4hRs0LAxn2YRBCU=&emci=4296ca11-e6a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=28d87a66-a9aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749) Mail a check, send a Venmo, hand over cash in an envelope -- just _give the money back, Mike._

**It’s bad enough that he won’t call on Matt Gaetz to resign.** But to have taken money from him? After everything that’s come out about Gaetz’s dealings -- to just ignore it proves how single-minded Mike Garcia really is. **_He only cares about keeping his seat in Congress._**

This episode is yet another example of Mike’s bad judgment. We don’t need more scandals -- we need a representative who will put their head down and get to work for our community.

**[Tell Mike: Return Matt Gaetz’s money TODAY. clean_body: Will Mike Garcia stick with Matt Gaetz even now? | Peter, If you haven’t heard the disgusting news by now, Matt Gaetz -- a top contender for the worst-member-of-Congress award -- is even dirtier than we knew. The Daily Beast just reported that he paid a minor for sex. Obviously, Gaetz must be completely disqualified from serving in the House for even one day longer -- beyond that, the Justice Department can decide. But here in CA-25, we also have to contend with the fact that our representative accepted money from this scumbag to power his 2020 election campaign. Mail a check, send a Venmo, hand over cash in an envelope -- just give the money back, Mike. It’s bad enough that he won’t call on Matt Gaetz to resign. But to have taken money from him? After everything that’s come out about Gaetz’s dealings -- to just ignore it proves how single-minded Mike Garcia really is. He only cares about keeping his seat in Congress. This episode is yet another example of Mike’s bad judgment. We don’t need more scandals -- we need a representative who will put their head down and get to work for our community. Thanks, Flip CA-25 P.S. = = | Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws. *

body:

name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: FWD: Save our California restaurants!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
FWD: Kevin Faulconer has a plan to save our California restaurants. Will you help? Read more >>
Peter, Did you see that Kevin Faulconer is teaming up with celebrity chef Andrew Gruel to SAVE the California restaurant industry? I’m forwarding you our latest email on it below, just in case you missed it. Government lockdowns have cause irreparable damage to the restaurant industry. For over a year, thousands of restaurants have closed for good due to Newsom’s over-the-top restrictions. The restaurants that are still standing are looking for solutions and relief but Newsom offers nothing but political talking points. California needs a PLAN, Peter. **We can roll out Kevin’s plan for restaurants on Day 1 once he’s elected, but we need to beat Newsom first.** _**Donate now to the campaign:**_ [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/048491bc57c5f338c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/05f3cae17d20afbfc3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/6aed04abb3d503a0c3d6b838967d376c/34943) The sooner we can get Gavin Newsom OUT of office, the sooner we can start working towards a California Comeback! Thanks again,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager | |

To: All Supporters
From: John Burke
Subject: Save our California restaurants!
Date: Wednesday, April 28, 2021 5:10 p.m.
Friend,

California’s restaurant industry has been _decimated_ by the COVID-19 pandemic lockdowns.

At points during the pandemic, our state led the nation in number of restaurants closed, and now tens of thousands of establishments have closed their doors for good.

**Kevin Faulconer recently teamed up with Chef Andrew Gruel of Slapfish, to draw attention to the issue. He said, “Jobs are gone, dreams have been crushed, and our communities where many of these restaurants have been institutions, are left emptier as a result.”**

Not only that, but thanks to Gavin Newsom’s draconian lockdown logic, the restaurants that are managing to survive are facing confusing and contradictory restrictions that are NOT based on science!

**[Please watch and share a short news clip of Kevin and Andrew’s news conference, and hear about their plan to SAVE the California restaurant industry.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/a7f2666e0654f9c0c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/16bf53a63bb91049c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
There _are_ real world, workable solutions that will allow restaurants to safely operate and serve our communities.

From Michelin Star restaurants to mom-and-pop local favorites, California has long been home to some of the best eateries in the world. We’re now in serious danger of losing this vital industry in our state.

We have to allow our restaurants to stay open, to feed our communities, and to provide jobs for hardworking men and women trying to pay their bills.

**Please help spread the word that there is a commonsense candidate for Governor who understands the vital importance of helping our restaurants recover and thrive in California!**

Thanks for your help,
John Burke, Communications Director
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/482bfee463a126b9c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/b6acf4e554e1bd20c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/3f8c1da065a7743ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9927fd7efd555e3c/3f75527b0a6c9200c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I just wanted y’all to know that this is TEAM AWESOME!!!!
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
I just wanted y’all to know that this is TEAM AWESOME!!!!
We reached our goal of 1,000 campaign contributions during the month of April — and then some. **Thank you so much for helping us reach 1,176 online contributions total.**
See for yourself! Here’s a screenshot Jayla grabbed from ActBlue:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/707?refcode=em20210501-62&t=1&akid=62%2E3698%2EgqlqF2)
I know that you don’t get to speak directly to me often. But that’s why I’m emailing you today. **I want you to know that I see you and your hard work, and I'm honored to have you on my team**. THANK YOU SO MUCH!!!
Look, we are building more than just a Senate campaign here. We’re building a moral movement for a North Carolina that works for ALL of us.
That means universal broadband and universal health care. That means reparations. That means a Green New Deal (_and_ a Blue New Deal).
Our platform for progress is possible — but we can’t do it without the kind of collective action we just witnessed this April. Our campaign is gaining momentum, you can feel it! But it’s critical that we keep the momentum going throughout the months ahead.
**So, thanks again from the bottom of my heart for helping us reach our goal.** I’ll be back in touch soon with more campaign updates.
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210501-62-footer&t=2&refcode2=62_3698_gqlqF2&akid=62%2E3698%2EgqlqF2)**

body:
It’s high time.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28526044/283518140/-2023814932?refcode=20210501_TM_5B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYmZlZS1kMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2v_OwDhoiNkMDvQbwNi9dRuTN2Hf2FYihIxxp4At98s=)

| | Derek,

When talking about Washington, D.C., in 1993, my friend the late John Lewis said: “It is not right that there is still an America where there is still some taxation without representation.”

Nearly 30 years later, John Lewis’s words are more urgent than ever: Washington, D.C. must become a state.

**[Do you agree that Washington, D.C. should become a state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28526046/283518142/1027226071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYmZlZS1kMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2v_OwDhoiNkMDvQbwNi9dRuTN2Hf2FYihIxxp4At98s=&emci=fcbb7cc3-aea6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=006dbfee-d0aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=7540477)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28526048/283518144/1027226071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYmZlZS1kMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2v_OwDhoiNkMDvQbwNi9dRuTN2Hf2FYihIxxp4At98s=&emci=fcbb7cc3-aea6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=006dbfee-d0aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=7540477)
---
[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28526050/283518146/1027226071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYmZlZS1kMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2v_OwDhoiNkMDvQbwNi9dRuTN2Hf2FYihIxxp4At98s=&emci=fcbb7cc3-aea6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=006dbfee-d0aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=7540477)
---
We saw this urgency last summer when Donald Trump flagrantly abused his federal powers and ordered the firing of tear gas into a crowd of peaceful protestors in Lafayette Square. All so he could stage a grotesque photo-op in front of St. John’s Church.

And we saw the urgency again when D.C. residents watched helplessly as a violent mob of domestic terrorists attacked in January. Because of its lack of statehood, the city had to rely on the federal government for protection -- protection Donald Trump wouldn't grant.

The result was a tragic insurrection at our nation's Capitol that resulted in the deaths of five people, including Capitol police officers.

Derek, this is an issue of civil rights, of voting rights, and of fairness.

It’s wrong to disenfranchise the 700,000 residents of Washington, D.C., and it’s time to end this national travesty. We must demand that they finally get a voice and a vote.

**[Can you add your name and join me in supporting D.C. statehood? We can’t let this injustice stand.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28526052/283518148/1027226071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYmZlZS1kMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2v_OwDhoiNkMDvQbwNi9dRuTN2Hf2FYihIxxp4At98s=&emci=fcbb7cc3-aea6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=006dbfee-d0aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=7540477)**

Thanks,

Terry
[DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28526054/283518150/-2023814932?refcode=20210501_TM_5B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkYmZlZS1kMGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2v_OwDhoiNkMDvQbwNi9dRuTN2Hf2FYihIxxp4At98s=)

subject: Breaking: Brad Parscale Weighs in on Our Race
body:
'If we keep fighting, we will win.' | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/breaking-brad-parscale-weighs-in-on-our-race?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b13e9b756f&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend, This is big.

A new poll shows that I am in the lead, and [with your help, we can seal the deal](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=96c2667631&e=3e017fab0f).

President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, Brad Parscale, is weighing in on our race and made his opinion clear: If we keep fighting, we will win.

But I can' do it alone. Never-Trumpers and establishment RINO's are doing everything they can to shut us down, cancel President Trump, and bring an end to his MAGA Movement forever.

We can't let that happen. Too much is at stake. Can you chip in a few bucks? [$5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 would help a lot](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1b9a47d81a&e=3e017fab0f)!

Together, we will take down the Never-Trump-RINOs and beat Phil Murphy in November!
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Make New Jersey Great Again
---
| P.S.: The Never-Trumpers are even propping-up fake candidates to split the conservative vote and end the Trump Movement. We can't let them [succeed. Your support of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more will go a long way to helping us win](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ba7a9286fa&e=3e017fab0f)!

**-H.V.S**
---
|
## _For the People_

This is outrageous, Fellow Conservative. Do you really want to live in a country where illegal immigrants are treated better than American citizens? Or do you want to live in a country where the American people are put first? The choice is yours, but if you care about American people over illegals, you need to step up towards our Extended End of Month deadline before it’s too late! | Peter,

Last night, we reached our fundraising goal for our critical End of Month fundraising deadline. I wanted to reach out to say thank you for your continued support of my campaign.

I am so grateful to have you on the team.

Defending one of the most vulnerable districts in the country is going to take a lot of work. But with grassroots support from people like you, I know we have what it takes to win.

I hope you enjoy the rest of the weekend and I look forward to continuing our work together.

Sincerely,
_Susan Wild_

P.S. If you’d like to help us get a head start on next month’s goal, you can chip in here: **_[https://wildforcongress.com/MayGoal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28529293/283545426/-1802352357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjhmYzBmNy1lOGFhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7uAe65Y_xUvIyGHxjSTvJhwzUq4A3ufCdbBDq1llkw=&emci=c2d9a967-f6a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=8b8fc0f7-e8aa-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=5543981)_**
